title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costco India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Costco India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
